result.status_detail: APF blocks the PII prompt successfully (qianwen cannot produce AI answer), but the APF-injected warning text is NOT rendered. Instead, qianwen's OWN generic error message is shown: '易덃겘?잍닇鸚김뇰竊뚩??띹캊' (Message generation failed, please retry). URL changed to /chat/cbde44b0ea824b5ab7bd320bbaa3b9c3 (conversation created). User prompt bubble visible with '二쇰??깅줉踰덊샇' (resident registration number). Pattern: BLOCKED_WITH_ERROR ??qianwen frontend fell back to its native error display instead of showing the APF warning.

notes: APF block mechanism itself works (qianwen couldn't complete normally). But warning rendering mismatch ??qianwen's frontend detects stream failure and displays generic Chinese error '易덃겘?잍닇鸚김뇰,瑥룬뇥瑥? instead of the APF-injected Korean warning '蹂댁븞 ?뺤콉...'. Next step: DevTools Network capture to see what bytes APF actually sent vs what qianwen frontend expected (similar to baidu #507 workflow). Likely protocol mismatch similar to baidu ??qianwen has its own SSE schema that needs byte-level matching.
